name: Western Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove egg yolk and mash with garlic.
2. Blend in salt, paprika, pepper, and mustard.
3. Add salad oil and vinegar; beat well.
4. Chop egg white and parsley and stir in.
5. Combine lettuce, spinach, and onion in a salad bowl.
6. Add dressing and toss lightly.
